steps.title: Find the highest value
steps.content: The question asks for the highest percentage of lithium recovered. In the graph, the tallest bar is the dark bar for Type B under recycling process 2, which reaches close to 75 percent.

steps.title: Use the closest table value
steps.content: B, C, and D give lower percentages that do not match the maximum shown by the tallest bar. The completion closest to the highest recovery percentage is 75 percent. The answer is A.
